Project.title: Project
Project.description: A coding project created by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the project.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the project was last updated.

projectId.description: The ID of the project this file belongs to.

path.description: The full path of the file.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the file was last updated.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A chat message between the user and the AI agent.

projectId.description: The ID of the project this message belongs to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

/files/{fileId}.description: Collection of files across all projects.
